economic_notes: GBEs include Black Lake Ventures Limited Partnership (99.99%), Black Lake Ventures Ltd (100%), Black Lake Development Corporation (100%), Elizabeth Falls Hydro Limited Partnership (99.99%), Elizabeth Falls Hydro Corporation (100%). Equity pickup from GBEs was $2,810,370 in 2023.
notes: Fiscal year ends March 31, 2023. Five GBEs accounted for under modified equity method (not consolidated line-by-line). Restricted cash includes CMHC reserve ($927,351) and project-specific restricted accounts ($8,457,063). Revenue includes large unexpended funds flows ($11,051,520 prior year recognized, -$15,754,667 current year deferred), making net revenue presentation complex. Deferred revenue - ISC alone is $14,820,719. Total government transfers calculated as ISC + AHA + CMHC + PAGC + Trust funds + NLCDC + Government of Canada = $30,971,808 + $1,726,078 + $765,950 + $1,135,172 + $13,697 + $93,717 + $0 = $34,706,422 before netting unexpended funds adjustments; OSR includes equity pickup, rentals, interest, IBA, FNT, rebates, other revenue. Auditor signed January 23, 2024 in Regina, Saskatchewan. No schedule of remuneration included in extracted text.
warnings: High ISC dependency (87.53%) — operations heavily reliant on federal transfers
